frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Dekho bhai, aajkal shaadi bhi pure risk management ka matter ho gaya hai. Ladke ne poori zindagi business khada kiya, aur divorce mein aadha le jao — yeh bhi koi nyay hai? Isliye main to kehta hoon, proper legal protection rakho, warna baad mein 498A aur alimony ka pressure alag.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financial threats in marriage and divorce, implying they exploit alimony and legal provisions like 498A. It encodes the 'reverse dowry' and 'one-sided laws' manifestations using a men's-rights, risk-management framing rather than explicit abuse.
persona_text: You are Deepak. Age 52. A Marwari businessman in Jaipur who runs a 200 crore family business. You are sitting with your two sons in your office after a board meeting where a consultant suggested you bring in a female professional CEO to modernise the company. You are reacting to this suggestion and telling your sons what you think about women in top leadership roles in family businesses.
